title: Overhead Crane Inspection – Equipment Shop
property_name: Cascade Bridge Constructors – Equipment Yard & Shop
description: Annual inspection and load test of 10-ton overhead bridge crane per ASME B30.17. Last inspection passed with minor chain lubrication needed. Schedule certified inspector before spring heavy lift season.

title: Equipment Yard Drainage Improvements
property_name: Cascade Bridge Constructors – Equipment Yard & Shop
description: Standing water in east yard after heavy rain events. Install French drain system along east perimeter – approximately 280 linear feet. Connect to existing storm drain at SE corner.

title: Office HVAC – Heat Pump Replacement Floor 18
description: Heat pump unit serving executive suite at end of service life – 14 years old. Replacement with VRF system. Coordinate with building management and lease requirements.
